name: pdfcompare
description: PDF comparison tool with typographic analysis

scripts.build:sidecar: cd pdfdiff && pip install -e '.[dev]' && pyinstaller pdfdiff.spec --noconfirm && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),{execSync}=require('child_process');const t=execSync('rustc -vV').toString().match(/host: (\S+)/)[1];const ext=process.platform==='win32'?'.exe':'';fs.copyFileSync('dist/pdfdiff'+ext,'../src-tauri/binaries/pdfdiff-'+t+ext);console.log('Copied sidecar to binaries/pdfdiff-'+t+ext)"
scripts.build:all: npm run build:sidecar && npm run build:app
